---
title: "The Economics of Music Sampling"
date: 2020-11-19
description: "On the history of sampling, the rise of streaming platforms, and how royalties shape the creative economy of music."
categories: [economics, culture]
draft: true
---

In 2018, the emergence of country rap made waves in the online community.

<!-- TODO: expand introduction -->

Sampling — the process of reusing a portion of a sound recording in a new recording — has been around since the 1940s. It is the backbone of

<!-- TODO: complete -->

## History of Sampling

<!-- TODO -->

## The Rise of Platforms

<!-- TODO -->

## Royalties

<!-- TODO -->
